shared_case_surface: bounded consumer-path cases that keep stats surface profiles, source-coverage thinness, SDK policy decisions, routing advisory hints, owner-truth targets, and final report wording separately reviewable
bounded_replacement_rule: A local repo may replace the concrete cases only if it preserves the same split-model question, keeps stats-derived signals weaker than owner truth, and still covers healthy coverage, thin coverage, advisory routing, SDK required re-grounding, and negative overclaim pressure.
public_safe_requirements: stats surface profiles and source coverage remain public-safe derived summaries
the SDK policy decision is inspectable without private operational context
routing hints remain advisory in the case surface
owner-local re-grounding targets are named without copying private logs
the eval report stays weaker than owner-local proof
